def positive_broad_exception_handler():
    rule_id = "broad_exception_handler"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Broad except Exception: style handlers that still obscure failure shape even when not fully swallowed."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
